steps.title: Restrict to the conditional sample
steps.content: The condition at least 10 years keeps only the 10–19 and 20+ columns. From the table, those columns total $30+30=60$ participants. Group A within those columns contributes $11+4=15$.

steps.title: Apply the conditional probability formula
steps.content: $$P(A\mid \text{age}\ge 10)=\frac{15}{60}=\frac{1}{4}.$$ The denominator is the restricted group of participants with at least 10 years, not the full table total. B is correct.
